min_wage.hint: ~2,100 CUP/month official minimum wage; real purchasing power varies due to dual-currency and informal USD economy

avg_salary.hint: Approximate public-sector average (~4,000 CUP/month); many workers earn additional informal or USD-based income

doctor_salary.hint: Public-sector general practitioners; some medical missions abroad offer significantly higher earnings
